message:
feat(vdbe): thread ScanCtx through emit_expr for cursor-aware expression codegen

Introduce a ScanCtx struct that carries cursor and table references into
emit_expr, enabling non-column expressions (arithmetic, CASE, CAST, and
direct column references via Opcode::Column) to be evaluated during
table-backed SELECT scans. Previously these fell through to an
Unsupported error or Null placeholder.

- Add ScanCtx parameter to emit_expr, emit_binary_op, emit_comparison,
  emit_is_comparison, and emit_case_expr; all non-scan callers pass None
- emit_column_reads now creates a ScanCtx for generic result expressions
  instead of returning CodegenError::Unsupported
- emit_where_filter fallback branch similarly threads ScanCtx for
  generic WHERE predicates referencing columns
- Relocate 12 integration tests (WHERE predicates, aggregates, LIKE,
  BETWEEN, IN, multi-row INSERT) from lib.rs to the dedicated
  bd-2832 harness test file for better organization

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
